scenes.heading: [Scene 1 - Shaji Pappan Wins, Loses, and Finds Pinky]
scenes.narration: Shaji Pappan and his team win a tug-of-war tournament, but their prize, a female goat named Pinky, might be more trouble than it's worth. Shaji's face: pure stress. The audience: howling. Shaji's back pain: activated.
scenes.visual_note: Quick cuts of the tug-of-war, followed by a comedic shot of Pinky the goat

scenes.heading: [Scene 2 - Satan Xavier Enters with Drama]
scenes.narration: Satan Xavier, the most extra villain, appears with a plan that will somehow, definitely not work. He thinks Shaji Pappan's team has stolen something valuable. The team is like, 'Uh, no, we just have a really cute goat.'
scenes.visual_note: Over-the-top entrance for Satan Xavier, complete with dramatic music

scenes.heading: [Scene 3 - Abu's Explosives Go Boom (Not in a Good Way)]
scenes.narration: Abu's explosive experiments go off with a bang, literally. His experiments are the real MVPs of chaos. Shaji Pappan's back pain: still a thing.
scenes.visual_note: Explosive fail montage with comedic sound effects

scenes.heading: [Scene 4 - Neelakoduveli, the Miracle Plant]
scenes.narration: The team hears about Neelakoduveli, a mystic plant that brings wealth. Because, of course, they need more ways to get into trouble. Satan Xavier and Dude are also on the hunt, because why not?
scenes.visual_note: A map or animation showing the various factions searching for Neelakoduveli

scenes.heading: [Scene 5 - Road Trip of Chaos and Misunderstandings]
scenes.narration: The hunt for Neelakoduveli turns into a road trip of double-crosses and absurd misunderstandings. Shaji Pappan's iconic red and black mundu makes an appearance, symbolizing bad luck and unmatched swagger.
scenes.visual_note: Montage of the road trip, showcasing the team's antics and Satan Xavier's over-the-top villainy

scenes.heading: [Scene 6 - Foolproof Plans and Epic Fails]
scenes.narration: The team comes up with 'foolproof' plans that fail epically. Abu's explosives still don't work as planned. Dude's hyper-machismo reaches new heights. It's a miracle they survive their own adventures.
scenes.visual_note: Quick cuts of the team's plans failing, with comedic sound effects and reactions

scenes.heading: [Scene 7 - The Final Showdown of Chaos]
scenes.narration: The final showdown is a mess of epic proportions. Everyone's after Neelakoduveli, but mostly they're just after each other. Shaji Pappan's back pain is the real hero, though. (Featuring: full-on kalipp mode, Idukki-level chaos, poor Pinky the goat, Shaji's legendary back pain — as always.)
scenes.visual_note: An action-packed montage of the final showdown, complete with comedic moments and explosions

closing_line: In the end, it's not about the Neelakoduveli or the money; it's about how Shaji Pappan's back survived all this chaos.
